perturbation.motivation: L17 v(S) = E[f(X)|X_S] is predictive. Replace with structural v_s(S) = sum over path effects.
perturbation.expected_output: New axiom: Structural Consistency SI_i(f) > 0 implies phi_i > 0

value_scores.reasoning: A hospital clinician using SHAP to explain a sepsis-risk score to a patient relies on v(S)=E[f(X)|X_S] meaning 'what would the model say if we observed this patient's labs'. A structural perturbation of the characteristic function (e.g., switching to interventional or marginal expectations) changes what the φ_i numbers actually refer to, breaking the narrative the clinician can carry to a bedside conversation.

The FAA running SHAP on real-time flight-risk models needs v(S) computable in milliseconds; conditional expectations on correlated sensor features often require kernel density estimators or MCMC, and any structural perturbation toward a more complex characteristic function typically degrades tractability further, though moving to interventional SHAP (a plausible structural change) can improve it.

Additivity of attributions (L17-LA) is guaranteed only when the value function v(S) is a proper cooperative game value and the φ_i decompose f(x)−φ_0; structurally perturbing v(S) — for instance, making it path-dependent on the order of conditioning — can violate the additive decomposition that a bankruptcy judge needs to show that the pie was split into claim-attributable pieces.

L17-CONS (consistency of attributions under model improvement) is a theorem consequence of v(S) being a well-defined game value; a frontier lab doing safety audits on a model version control chain needs the property that improving a sub-model does not flip the sign of a feature's attribution, and any structural change that breaks the game-theoretic isomorphism threatens this.

Shapley values satisfy symmetry (equal roles → equal pay). A hospital audit comparing SHAP attributions across two correlated lab markers (e.g., CRP and ESR) relies on v(S) treating symmetric feature roles symmetrically; a structural perturbation that makes v(S) depend on the data-generating ordering can break this even when features are functionally interchangeable.

Sen-style capability expansion for an FAA safety analyst means the SHAP tool genuinely enlarges the set of decisions they can competently make about a model; a perturbed characteristic function that changes the semantic of φ_i shrinks the analyst's effective capability set because the old mental model ('φ_i is the feature's contribution') no longer applies.

Continuity — small changes in problem data produce small attribution changes — is fragile when v(S) involves estimating conditional expectations on a manifold of correlated features; a structural perturbation of v(S) (e.g., a different conditioning scheme) can introduce discontinuities at boundaries of the feature support that a frontier lab monitoring model behavior in deployment will see as instability.

Personalized explanation (each clinician or patient gets a tailored φ_i narrative) depends on v(S) being a function of the specific x being explained; structurally perturbing v(S) — for example, to a global rather than local characteristic function — collapses the per-instance narrative into a population-level one, undermining the bankruptcy judge's ability to give each creditor a customized justification grounded in their specific filing.

new_axiom.statement_nl: The natural-language statement cannot be reconstructed because no axiom identifier or topic was supplied alongside the audit report, leaving the underlying mathematical claim unspecified and therefore unsuitable for faithful rewriting.
new_axiom.justification: This axiom translates a normative judgment into a binding constraint on the mechanism: when adopted by a specific planner—whether a school-choice administrator, a medical residency match director, or a bankruptcy judge—it restricts the set of admissible outcomes so that efficiency gains cannot override the protected property, thereby imposing a clearly identified trade-off between optimality and the principle being upheld.
new_axiom.user_facing_explanation: This axiom ensures that the mechanism's outcome depends only on participants' true preferences rather than on strategic misrepresentation, so users can report honestly without fearing that some clever manipulation would have produced a better result for them personally.

consequences.statement: 在 FAA landing slot reassignment 场景下, 如果设计者无法声明其机制所满足的具体公理(如 strategy-proofness, individual rationality, 或 efficiency 中的哪一个), 那么 Gibbard-Satterthwaite / Repugnant Transaction 类型的经典不可能性定理不再具有约束力——因为不可能性定理的前提是同时要求一组公理, 而缺失的公理陈述使得 planner 可以隐性逃避这组约束, 重新实现'任意可行结果'。

在 cost-sharing (camels allegory) 场景下, 如果公理未被指明, 则核心 (core)、核仁 (nucleolus) 与 Shapley 值三种解概念在表面都成为'可接受'的分配——因为区分它们恰好依赖于 cross-monotonicity / consistency / stand-alone test 等具体公理; 公理缺失导致信息熵塌缩, 三种解无法被排除, planner 面临选择瘫痪或事后任意性。
在 FAA 这类公共资源再分配场景下, 如果公理识别失败, 则实操中会催生一种新的前置程序——'axiom elicitation audit': 在设计机制前对 airlines、机场运营方、公众进行结构化 axiom 偏好采集, 将公理选择从设计师的隐含假设转化为可审计的输入; 此技术本身成为机制设计元层 (meta-mechanism) 的标准组件。

在 camels cost-sharing 场景下, 可证伪预测: 若某医院 cost-sharing 规则的设计者被要求公开声明其满足的公理 (例如 cross-monotonicity) 时无法做到, 则该规则在 6 个月内至少出现 1 次被至少一名受影响 patient 提出的可成立挑战 (challenge 率 > baseline 5%), 反映公理真空下的规则本质上缺乏 stakeholder 认可的内生稳定性。
